specific_question: As of Q4 2024, how many pharmacies does MediConn Solutions use to handle prescription management and delivery after a doctor prescribes medication during a virtual visit, and will this trend continue into 2025?
answer: As of Q4 2024, electronic prescriptions are sent to 15 partner pharmacies within, but patients must separately choose delivery or pickup. Prescription delivery through MediConn's service takes 24-48 hours and costs an additional $15.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
